title: Mob Battle Mod
description: Creative utensils in creating mob battles
body: --- ## 🗡️ Mob Battle Mod You like mob battles? Do you want to know which mob is the strongest one? Then look no further. This small mod adds in items which will help you in creating (and maintaining) those epic mob fights you sought after. This is meant to be played in creative mode. All tools have in-game tooltips explaining how they work. ## 📦 Items: ### Mob Stick: Makes 2 mobs fight each other ### Mob Stick Group: Makes a group of mobs fight another single mob ### Mob Heal: Heals a mob back to full health ### Mob Kill: Kills a mob (no command typing etc anymore!) ### Mob Effect: Remove every potion effect from the selected mob ### Effect giver: Give a mob a potion ### Armor Editor: With it you can edit equipments from mobs really easy ![](https://imgur.com/De9eHRo.png) ### Mob Mount: Stack mobs without command and on existing mobs. ### Mob Army: Add mobs to a team, opposite teams attack each other and ignore everything else. It uses minecraft build in scoreboard so you can join a team too. Mobs in same team can't hurt each other if friendlyfire is off. Another advantage teams have other the mob stick is that the mob stick only sets the target once. Mobs on team will automatically seek out enemy teams. ### Mob Equip: Makes mob able to pickup items without manually giving it to them. ### Extended Spawnegg: Mimicks a normal spawnegg but with additional features. Can spawn any mobs, in contrast to vanilla spawnegg. Left clicking a mob will set the spawnegg to spawn that mob, shift while doing so will also copy all its data to spawn an exact copy. ## 📚 FAQ ### Phantoms To allow phantoms to attack properly they need to be on teams as phantoms constantly reset their target. This is still kinda buggy though so keep that in mind ### Slimes Normally slimes can only damage players and iron golems. Starting from version 2.4.8+ slimes can now damage other mobs too ### Withers + Enderdragons Withers cannot be damaged by undead mobs and enderdragons can only be damaged by players or explosions in vanilla. You need version 2.6.0+ to allow other mobs to damage them. ### Summoned mobs Mobs that summon other mobs need to be on a team to properly account for that. The mod will try to detect if a mob is summoned from another mob. This is done by checking if the summoned mob has an owner. If a mod does not set this properly then this detection will fail
